findings.title: No visible tests or smoke harness
findings.detail: No tests/ directory or obvious test files were found.

findings.title: Installer references missing file
findings.detail: Installer references `skill_helper.py` but it is not present in the package.

findings.title: README claims missing file or directory
findings.detail: README mentions `server/` but it was not found in the package.

findings.title: README describes HTTP/server architecture not found in code
findings.detail: README appears to describe a local HTTP bridge, but no matching HTTP implementation was detected in code.

findings.title: Potentially broad file/path access without containment checks
findings.detail: Code appears to read local file paths with no visible resolve/containment boundary.
